name: International Land Alliance Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Description of Business. International Land Alliance, Inc. (the Company, ILAL, or we) was incorporated under the laws of the State of Wyoming on September 26, 2013 (inception). The Company is a residential land development company with target properties located in the Baja California, Northern region of Mexico and Southern California.
